## Checklist

- [ ] `node scripts/check.mjs` passes (JS syntax + local links + EN/zh parity)
- [ ] EN and `zh-*` pages kept in sync
- [ ] Verified in a real browser (not just headless)
- [ ] No build step / framework introduced
- [ ] No personal data / secrets added (see do-not-publish in SKILL.md)
